seo.title: Spekko curry and rice meatballs - Marinda Kook

html:
You know, a meatball is one of the tastiest comfort foods you can get, if you ask me. You can wake me up for a meatball. I've eaten very few bad meatballs and bread in my life.

The meatballs get cooked rice in the ingredients. It gives a lovely texture and stretches the meat a little.

Ingredients

  • 100ml oil
  • 800g boerewors mince (I buy boerewors and just have the mince strung out. It's already nicely seasoned)
  • 1 egg, beaten
  • 30 ml apricot jam
  • 60 ml chutney
  • 30 ml medium curry powder
  • 10 ml turmeric
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 5 ml salt
  • 250 ml cooked rice

Method

  • Set the oven to 180C
  • Mix everything together and roll into balls.
  • Place them on a greased baking tray. (it's always better if you can leave them in the fridge for about an hour)
  • Pour the oil into a baking tray/pan and place the meatballs in the oil
  • Bake uncovered for 15 minutes.
  • Turn the meatballs over and bake for another 15 minutes until nicely browned.
  • You can also make a curry sauce and bake them in the sauce too.

Sauce

  • 1 tin tomato and onion mix
  • 5ml sugar
  • 5ml vinegar
  • 125 ml water
  • 15 ml curry powder
  • 5ml turmeric
  • Salt
  • Pepper
  • Mix everything together and pour over the meatballs and bake in the oven.
